title: Pre-arrival services: Get help before you arrive in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Pre-arrival services: Get help before you arrive in Canada
Start your journey to Canada with confidence—while you’re still in your home country. Our free online pre-arrival services provide you and your family with resources to prepare for your move and adapt successfully to life in Canada.
Once you’re here, these services connect you with local organizations for continued support.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
